title: DCR-Attention: Exact Q-Axis Sparse Decode at Production Scale
description: Training-free Q-axis sparse attention for long-context LLM decode: exact ranking (Theorem 1), a measured scaling law dPPL=O(N^-(1-alpha)) with alpha~0.31, retention of long-range dependence to 128K, and a per-query certificate, validated under matched-control discipline. Llama-3.2-1B, WikiText-2.
